---
title: "Remote Sensing and Geospatial Data Science"
subtitle: "Track B — Geospatial"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Remote Sensing and Geospatial Data Science

**Track**: Track B — Geospatial

The data pipeline for geospatial modeling: satellite imagery, LiDAR, sensor networks, and the computational infrastructure for processing massive geospatial datasets.

## Table of Contents

1. Satellite Remote Sensing Fundamentals
2. Image Classification and Land Cover Mapping
3. Spectral Unmixing
4. Change Detection
5. LiDAR and 3D Point Cloud Processing
6. Data Fusion and Multi-Sensor Integration
7. Big Geospatial Data Infrastructure
8. Applications: Environmental Monitoring and Urban Analytics

---

## Chapter 1: Satellite Remote Sensing Fundamentals

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Image Classification and Land Cover Mapping

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Spectral Unmixing

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Change Detection

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: LiDAR and 3D Point Cloud Processing

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Data Fusion and Multi-Sensor Integration

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Big Geospatial Data Infrastructure

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Applications: Environmental Monitoring and Urban Analytics

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
